questionHtml: State the chemical difference between the 5' end and the 3' end of a DNA strand.
markschemeHtml:
5′ end contains a phosphate group «on carbon 5»
OR
3′ carbon contains a hydroxyl/OH group «on carbon 3» ✔

meta.title: State the chemical difference between the 5' end and the 3' end of a DNA strand.
